assertions.reason: GitHub Actions shows successful `build-ios` jobs on runs 24753819737 (head `7e86221`) and 24754326012 (head `c931605`), but the current local branch is ahead of `origin/mission/biometric-vault` by 5 commits, including build-affecting fix commit `08a6b24` that modified `ios/EnboxMobile.xcodeproj/project.pbxproj` and `RCTNativeBiometricVault.mm`. Because no `ci.yml` run exists after those fixes landed and this task forbids dispatching a new workflow, the current milestone state cannot be confirmed for VAL-NATIVE-013.

GitHub Actions run 24754326012 proves `build-android` succeeded for remote head `c931605` and uploaded artifact `android-debug-apk` containing `app-debug.apk`, but the current local branch is ahead of origin by 5 commits, including build-affecting fix commit `08a6b24` that modified `android/app/src/main/java/org/enbox/mobile/nativemodules/NativeBiometricVaultModule.kt`. With no existing `ci.yml` run for the post-fix commits and no permission to dispatch one, the current milestone state remains unverified for VAL-NATIVE-021.

frictions.description: The latest successful remote `ci.yml` run is for `origin/mission/biometric-vault` head `c931605`, while the local mission branch contains five newer commits. The validator had to compare GitHub run SHAs against local git refs to determine whether the success evidence still applied.
frictions.resolution: Saved `git-status.txt`, `head-vs-origin.txt`, and `commits-ahead-of-origin.txt`; this showed the existing green runs do not cover the current local post-fix commits.

blockers.description: No existing `ci.yml` run on `mission/biometric-vault` covers the build-affecting fixes introduced after remote head `c931605`, especially commit `08a6b24` (iOS project/native code and Android native module changes).
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Inspected all available branch `ci.yml` runs via `gh run list`/`gh run view`, checked artifact metadata/download for the latest green run, and compared the run head SHAs to local `HEAD`/`origin/mission/biometric-vault`; dispatching a new workflow was intentionally not attempted because the assignment forbids it.

summary: Tested 2 assertions: 0 passed, 0 failed, 2 blocked. Existing green CI runs 24753819737 (`7e86221`) and 24754326012 (`c931605`) both show `build-ios` and `build-android` passing, and run 24754326012 uploaded `android-debug-apk` containing `app-debug.apk`, but no `ci.yml` run exists after the later build-affecting fix commit `08a6b24` on the current local branch.
